name: adversarial-review
description: Adversarial, ship/no-ship code review of a git diff or branch — runs against any LLM (API or local CLI agent) and returns structured findings

scripts.sync-skill: node --input-type=module -e "import{copyFileSync,mkdirSync,existsSync}from'fs';const files=['prompt-template.md','prompt-template-artifact.md','schema.json'];const dests=['skills/adversarial-review/references','.agents/skills/adversarial-review/references'];for(const d of dests){mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of files)copyFileSync(f,d+'/'+f);}"

author: Chris Williams (@voodootikigod)
